name: A3 venue partner outreach
objective: Book intro calls with hotel and venue decision-makers.

variant_a.name: Case-study lead
variant_a.hypothesis: Leading with a stadium case study books more calls.
variant_a.content: We wrapped an NFL stadium in 48 hours.

variant_b.name: Question lead
variant_b.hypothesis: A provocative question books more calls.
variant_b.content: What would your lobby look like fully branded?
